full_text:
Lu Zhao 路招
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Zhao (路招). Dispatched with Liu Bei to block Yuan Shu’s attempts to get to Yuan Shao. Lu Zhao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
